summary: In the context of the [ERC-6860](./eip-6860.md) `web3://` standard, this ERC extends the [ERC-6944](./eip-6944.md) resolve mode: This standard defines a new optional ``web3-next-chunk`` HTTP header returned by the `request()` call, that contains a `web3://` URL pointing to the next data chunk of the resource data. Chunks are streamed to the `web3://` client, and it loops until the ``web3-next-chunk`` header is no longer present.
title: Chunk support for ERC-5219 mode in Web3 URL
